testcase.name: 支付页面功能测试 › 应该加载支付页面并显示基本信息

failure.message: payment-ui.spec.ts:180:7 应该加载支付页面并显示基本信息

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › payment-ui.spec.ts:180:7 › 支付页面功能测试 › 应该加载支付页面并显示基本信息 ───────────────────────────────
Error: expect(received).toBeDefined()
Received: undefined
168 | // 找到第一个活跃的会员等级 169 | const activeTier = tiers.data?.tiers?.find(tier => tier.isActive); > 170 | expect(activeTier).toBeDefined(); | ^ 171 | validTierId = activeTier?.id || ''; 172 | 173 | await context.close(); at D:\legal_debate_mvp\src\__tests__\e2e\payment-ui.spec.ts:170:24
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\..\test-results\payment-ui-支付页面功能测试-应该加载支付页面并显示基本信息-chromium\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: 支付页面功能测试 › 应该显示所有支付方式选项
支付页面功能测试 › 应该能够选择支付方式
支付页面功能测试 › 应该显示支付确认区域
支付页面功能测试 › 应该显示温馨提示信息
支付页面功能测试 › 应该能够取消支付并返回
支付成功页面测试 › 应该显示支付成功页面
支付成功页面测试 › 应该显示订单信息
支付成功页面测试 › 应该能够返回首页
支付失败页面测试 › 应该显示支付失败页面
支付失败页面测试 › 应该显示错误详情

failure.message: payment-ui.spec.ts:309:7 应该显示错误详情

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › payment-ui.spec.ts:309:7 › 支付失败页面测试 › 应该显示错误详情 ──────────────────────────────────────
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByText('支付超时') Expected: visible Timeout: 30000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 30000ms - waiting for getByText('支付超时')
316 | // 验证错误详情 317 | await expect(page.getByText('错误详情')).toBeVisible(); > 318 | await expect(page.getByText('支付超时')).toBeVisible(); | ^ 319 | }); 320 | 321 | test('应该支持重试支付', async ({ page }) => { at D:\legal_debate_mvp\src\__tests__\e2e\payment-ui.spec.ts:318:42

testcase.name: 支付失败页面测试 › 应该支持重试支付
支付失败页面测试 › 应该能够联系客服

failure.message: payment-ui.spec.ts:329:7 应该能够联系客服

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › payment-ui.spec.ts:329:7 › 支付失败页面测试 › 应该能够联系客服 ────────────────────────────────────── Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: getByText('客服') Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: getByText('客服') resolved to 2 elements: 1) aka getByRole('button', { name: '联系客服' }) 2)
  • • 如问题持续存在，请联系客服寻求帮助
    • aka getByText('• 如问题持续存在，请联系客服寻求帮助') Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 30000ms - waiting for getByText('客服') 335 | 336 | // 验证联系信息显示 > 337 | await expect(page.getByText('客服')).toBeVisible(); | ^ 338 | }); 339 | }); 340 | at D:\legal_debate_mvp\src\__tests__\e2e\payment-ui.spec.ts:337:40 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\..\test-results\payment-ui-支付失败页面测试-应该能够联系客服-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\..\test-results\payment-ui-支付失败页面测试-应该能够联系客服-chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\..\..\test-results\payment-ui-支付失败页面测试-应该能够联系客服-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: 订单管理页面测试 › 应该显示筛选选项

failure.message: payment-ui.spec.ts:384:7 应该显示筛选选项

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › payment-ui.spec.ts:384:7 › 订单管理页面测试 › 应该显示筛选选项 ──────────────────────────────────────
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('text=全部') Expected: visible Received: hidden Timeout: 30000ms
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 30000ms - waiting for locator('text=全部') 33 × locator resolved to <option value="" selected>全部状态</option> - unexpected value "hidden"
387 | 388 | // 验证状态筛选 > 389 | await expect(page.locator('text=全部')).toBeVisible(); | ^ 390 | await expect(page.locator('text=待支付')).toBeVisible(); 391 | await expect(page.locator('text=已支付')).toBeVisible(); 392 | at D:\legal_debate_mvp\src\__tests__\e2e\payment-ui.spec.ts:389:43

failure.message: payment-ui.spec.ts:399:7 应该支持按状态筛选订单

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › payment-ui.spec.ts:399:7 › 订单管理页面测试 › 应该支持按状态筛选订单 ───────────────────────────────────
Test timeout of 120000ms exceeded.
Error: page.click: Test timeout of 120000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('text=待支付') - locator resolved to <option value="PENDING">待支付</option> - attempting click action 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 20ms 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 100ms 226 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 500ms
402 | 403 | // 点击待支付筛选 > 404 | await page.click('text=待支付'); | ^ 405 | 406 | // 验证筛选生效 407 | await expect(page.locator('.order-list')).toBeVisible(); at D:\legal_debate_mvp\src\__tests__\e2e\payment-ui.spec.ts:404:16

failure.message: payment-ui.spec.ts:410:7 应该支持搜索订单

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › payment-ui.spec.ts:410:7 › 订单管理页面测试 › 应该支持搜索订单 ──────────────────────────────────────
Test timeout of 120000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.fill: Test timeout of 120000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('input[placeholder="搜索订单号、描述"]')
